global_style_prompt: Create a refined editorial illustration with clean geometry, subtle texture, restrained contrast, and research-journal tone. Prefer muted neutrals with one controlled accent color. Avoid logos, text overlays, UI screenshots, watermarks, photoreal faces, and visual clutter. Keep composition readable at web-hero scale.
negative_prompt: No typography in image, no branding marks, no memes, no chaotic collage, no sensational disaster visuals, no gore, no photoreal people.
